name: moos-ivp-skills
description: MOOS-IvP skills for apps, IvP behaviors, missions, test harnesses, documentation, and alog analysis.

interface.longDescription: Build MOOS apps, IvP helm behaviors, runnable missions, self-evaluating missions, and test harnesses. Consult MOOS-IvP documentation and analyze MOOS .alog files.
defaultPrompt: Use MOOS-IvP skills to build or repair this MOOS app.
Use MOOS-IvP skills to create a self-evaluating mission harness.
Use MOOS-IvP skills to analyze this .alog mission run.
